title: Implement Live Heap Introspection
description: Safely generate and export core dumps and heap snapshots from OOM-crashing production pods. Perform post-mortem analysis of heap snapshots to identify closure-based memory leaks. Utilize tools for live heap introspection to debug memory-related issues in deployed applications.
objectives: Safely generate and export core dumps and heap snapshots from OOM-crashing production pods.
Perform post-mortem analysis of heap snapshots to identify closure-based memory leaks.
Utilize tools for live heap introspection to debug memory-related issues in deployed applications.
